creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Bengt Ahlgren from comment #16)
> libreoffice binaries built on 11.4-RELEASE still does not work on 11.4-STABLE after the libcxxrt updates. A change on stable branches should not require re-compilation of packages, or?

IIUC, it shouldn't.  If this is the case, this sounds a regression of stable/14 branch.  But just being curious, does rebuilding on 11.4-STABLE help?

Another thing I am worried is if this also happens on stable/12.
